title: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]“Sir Galalot”[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of [gold]commanders[/gold], [aqua]generals[/aqua], [red]warlords[/red], and [blue]mercenaries[/blue] having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a [gold]golden crown[/gold] speaks.

[jitter]“Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!”[/jitter]
conditions: All players have at least 12 HP
notes: This event is multi-step. Choosing [red]Pick a Fight[/red] shows an intermediate flavor page describing the brawl, then a [blue]Continue[/blue] button triggers the actual effects: [red]11[/red] unblockable, unpowered damage and a random relic from the front of the relic pool. The [green]Enjoy Your Tea[/green] option grants [red]Royal Poison[/red] (an event relic that deals [red]4[/red] damage at the start of each combat) and fully heals the player.
